description: a beaming dark-skinned young man laughing with his whole face, short cropped hair, dimples, easy relaxed posture, lean athletic build, wearing only plain underclothes (a plain sleeveless undershirt and simple shorts), barefoot, neutral undressed base body ready to be dressed, detailed RPG pixel art inspired by Grave Seasons, realistic human proportions and expressive faces, naturalistic lighting and a varied lifelike color palette, soft dramatic shading, high detail, clean readable shapes; mature art for a teen-and-up audience, never childish or cutesy but not forced to be dark
